0:{"buildId":"BHcQodUFl_azr20MEQ1-a","rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"prose prose-zinc max-w-none","children":[["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-8 not-prose","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl font-bold mb-2","children":"Designing a Production-Grade Multi-Agent Platform"}],["$","time",null,{"className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground","children":"October 1, 2025"}]]}],[["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Multi-agent systems are moving from research curiosity to production reality. This post shares lessons from building Shannon, a platform deployed at several Fortune 500 companies."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Core Design Principles"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"1. Deterministic Replay"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"In production, agents will fail. When they do, you need to understand exactly why."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Every agent execution must be:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Logged"}],": Complete trace of inputs, outputs, and intermediate states"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Replayable"}],": Given the same inputs, reproduce the exact same behavior"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Inspectable"}],": Human-readable representation of agent reasoning"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Implementation:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"className":"bg-muted p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto mb-4","children":["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-meta","children":"@traceable"}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"class"}]," ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-title class_","children":"Agent"}],":\n    ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"def"}]," ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-title function_","children":"run"}],"(",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-params","children":"self, task: Task"}],") -> Result:\n        ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-comment","children":"# All LLM calls, tool uses, and state changes are logged"}],"\n        ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-comment","children":"# Can be replayed later with identical outputs"}],"\n        ",["$","span",null,{"className":"hljs-keyword","children":"pass"}],"\n"]}]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"2. Budget Enforcement"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents can consume unbounded resources if not constrained:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Token budgets"}],": Maximum tokens per task, per step, per tool call"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Time budgets"}],": Maximum execution time with graceful degradation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cost budgets"}],": Maximum dollar cost per task"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"When budgets are exceeded, the system must fail gracefully with a partial result, not crash."}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"3. Fault Isolation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents should not bring down the system:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Process isolation"}],": Each agent runs in a separate process/container"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Circuit breakers"}],": Temporarily disable failing agents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":["$L2",": Reduce agent complexity rather than fail entirely"]}],"\n"]}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d"]]}],null,"$L1e"]}],"loading":null,"isPartial":false}
2:["$","strong",null,{"children":"Graceful degradation"}]
3:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Communication Patterns"}]
4:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"Hierarchical"}]
5:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"A single orchestrator delegates to specialized agents:"}]
6:["$","pre",null,{"className":"bg-muted p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto mb-4","children":["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono","children":"Orchestrator\n├── Research Agent\n├── Code Agent\n└── Review Agent\n"}]}]
7:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Pros: Simple, clear responsibility\nCons: Single point of failure, potential bottleneck"}]
8:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"Flat (Peer-to-Peer)"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents communicate directly through a message bus:"}]
a:["$","pre",null,{"className":"bg-muted p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto mb-4","children":["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono","children":"Agent A ←→ Message Bus ←→ Agent B\n              ↕\n           Agent C\n"}]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Pros: Flexible, scalable\nCons: Harder to debug, potential for message storms"}]
c:["$","h3",null,{"className":"text-xl font-semibold mb-3 mt-5","children":"Market-Based"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents bid for tasks based on their capabilities:"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Pros: Efficient resource allocation, emergent specialization\nCons: Complex auction mechanisms, harder to predict behavior"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"We found hierarchical works best for most enterprise use cases, with flat for specialized workflows."}]
10:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"State Management"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents need memory, but unconstrained memory leads to:"}]
12:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Context overflow"}],": Exceeding LLM token limits"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Privacy risks"}],": Storing sensitive data indefinitely"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Performance degradation"}],": Longer context = slower inference"]}],"\n"]}]
13:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Our approach:"}]
14:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working memory"}],": Recent conversation history (sliding window)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic memory"}],": Summarized past interactions (vector store)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Semantic memory"}],": Learned facts and rules (knowledge graph)"]}],"\n"]}]
15:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Observability"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"You can't improve what you can't measure:"}]
17:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency"}],": Time to first token, time to completion"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Quality"}],": Human evaluations, automated benchmarks"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cost"}],": Tokens, compute, API calls"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Reliability"}],": Success rate, error types"]}],"\n"]}]
18:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Build dashboards before deploying to production."}]
19:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Security Considerations"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Agents with tool access are powerful and dangerous:"}]
1b:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Principle of least privilege"}],": Agents only get access to what they need"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Human-in-the-loop"}],": High-stakes actions require approval"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Audit logging"}],": Every action attributable to a user and agent"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sandboxing"}],": Agent code runs in restricted environments"]}],"\n"]}]
1c:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"What's Next"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The next frontier is agent composition: building complex systems from simple, reusable agent components. Think Unix pipes, but for AI agents."}]
1e:["$","$L1f",null,{"children":["$","$20",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@21"}]}]
